violations.detail: Logger field should be the first field in the instance section, but SUB_COMPONENT_ID and SUB_COMPONENT_NAME (static final String constants) precede it. Per convention, Logger should come first among static final fields.
Field 'toggleHandler' (private final) appears after non-final private fields (text, domFinished, status, etc.) at lines 155-164. Private final fields should precede private non-final fields.
Field 'aur' (private final) at line 167 appears after non-final private fields. Private final fields should precede private non-final fields.
